name: Orion Bliss Corp.
sic_description: Soap, Detergents, Cleang Preparations, Perfumes, Cosmetics
summary: PART I . Orion Bliss Corp. was incorporated in the State of Nevada on March 23, 2021. We are a small company formed to offer beauty products online and in the future planning to open chains of stands and stores as well as online store. We will be buying from the Distributor - Red Hot Products Ltd and concentrate on the Milk-shake products that make the most of the benefits of nature to offer dedicated solutions for all hair types.
